modules.name: Dashboard Overview
features: Real-time KPIs (total head, ADG, feed cost, conversion, mortality, occupancy)
Critical alerts banner
Performance trend chart (6 months)
Lot status distribution (pie chart)
Planned vs actual feed consumption (bar chart)
Active lots summary table

modules.name: Feedlot Operations
features: Lot tracking table with full details (owner, head, DOF, weight, ration, ADG, COG)
Filterable by status (receiving, step-up, feeding, closeout)
Visual pen map (grid layout with capacity and occupancy)
Pen movement history log
Lifecycle progress bars per lot

modules.name: Advanced Feeding System
features: Ration cards (DM%, CP%, NEL, ingredients, cost/ton)
Diet assignment table with auto-transition tracking
Step-up feeding protocol with roughage progression
Automatic ration transition rules
Weight projection charts (projected vs actual)
Cost of gain comparison by lot
Closeout projection calculator
Feed delivery plan with status tracking

modules.name: Mixer & Feeding Logistics
features: Mixer status cards (capacity, load, mix time)
Feed truck real-time status (driver, route, deliveries)
Feeding cycle chart (AM/PM loads per mixer)
Route optimization (pens, distance, time, efficiency %)

modules.name: Real-Time Feeding Monitoring
features: Visual bunk score cards (color-coded 0–2+)
Planned vs actual intake per pen with variance %
Hourly feed consumption chart
Weekly consumption trend (planned vs actual)
Feed inventory table with days-remaining bars and status

modules.name: Livestock Management
features: Weight projection chart (projected vs actual over weeks)
ADG performance by lot (bar chart vs target)
Active lots performance table
Closeout report analytics (head in/out, F:G, COG, death loss, profit)

modules.name: Animal Health
features: Health records table (animal EID, diagnosis, treatment, temp, status)
Treatment protocols (BRD pulls, foot rot, pinkeye, arrival processing)
Chute processing workflow (6-step sequence with timing)
Diagnosis distribution pie chart
Weekly treatment activity chart (pulls, treatments, re-treats)

modules.name: Inventory Management
features: Feed inventory with reorder points and days supply
Medication inventory with cost/dose tracking
Grain bank tracking per client (delivered, used, balance)
7-day inventory trend chart
Action buttons for critical/warning items

modules.name: Financial Management
features: Monthly P&L chart (revenue, expenses, net profit)
Expense breakdown pie chart (feed, operations, health, labor)
Client billing summary (feed cost, yardage, health, total due)
Interest & service fee calculations for overdue accounts
Invoice generation and export

modules.name: Hardware & Equipment
features: Equipment status cards (scales, EID readers, micro-ingredient, load cells, weather)
Online/offline monitoring with troubleshoot actions
Data integration flow diagram
Mobile field operations (feed truck app, pen rider app, processing app)

modules.name: Users & Collaboration
features: Team member cards with role badges
Role-based access control matrix (admin, operator, veterinarian, nutritionist)
External stakeholder access management
Activity log with timestamped actions

components.Layout: src/components/Layout.jsx — Sidebar navigation, header with search & alerts, responsive shell
components.KpiCard: src/components/KpiCard.jsx — Reusable metric card with icon, value, trend indicator
components.StatusBadge: src/components/StatusBadge.jsx — Color-coded status pill (30+ status variants)

data.mockData: src/data/mockData.js — Comprehensive mock dataset (lots, pens, rations, schedules, health, inventory, financials, users, alerts, equipment)

scripts.dev: npm run dev — Start development server
scripts.preview: npm run preview — Preview production build
